summary: Tested Account-Distributor Assignment UI functionality. All 14 features requested were tested. Core functionality works: login, navigation to Distributors, distributor detail page, Account Assignments tab, assignment dialog with account search, city/location selection, primary/backup checkboxes, special margin override, create assignment, delete assignment. Found 2 minor display issues in toast/confirmation messages.

ui_bugs.issue: Success toast shows 'Account undefined assigned successfully' instead of showing the account name. The account name (company or name field) may be undefined for some accounts returned by search API.
Delete confirmation dialog shows 'This will remove "" from this distributor' instead of showing the account name (deleteTarget?.name is empty)

action_items: MINOR: Fix toast message in handleCreateAssignment to properly display account name - the selectedAccount.company || selectedAccount.name may be undefined for some accounts
MINOR: Fix deleteTarget?.name to ensure account_name is passed when setting delete target
critical_code_review_comments: Line 630 DistributorDetail.js: toast.success uses selectedAccount.company || selectedAccount.name but this evaluates to undefined for accounts without these fields populated
Line 1913 DistributorDetail.js: setDeleteTarget passes assignment.account_name but this may be empty if account_name wasn't stored properly during assignment creation
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test assignment during testing. No permanent test data left.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Account-Distributor Assignment UI is functional. Test distributor (DIST-0002) has 6 cities coverage (Gurugram, Margao, New Delhi, Noida, Panaji, Vasco da Gama) and 1 location (Test at Margao). The account search API returns accounts with id, company, name, city, state, account_id fields - some accounts may have empty company/name fields causing 'undefined' in toast messages.

login_with_prefilled_credentials.details: Login page has pre-filled email (surya.yadavalli@nylaairwater.earth) and password. Sign In button works.

navigate_to_distributors_page.details: Distributors page accessible at /distributors, shows 2 distributors (Test DIST-0002, ABC Distribution Co DIST-0001)

click_distributor_to_view_detail.details: Navigated to /distributors/99fb55dc-532c-4e85-b618-6b8a5e552c04 - shows Test distributor detail with tabs

account_assignments_tab_visible_clickabl.details: Tab with data-testid='assignments-tab' visible and shows count (0). Clicking switches to assignments view.

assign_account_button_opens_dialog.details: Button with data-testid='assign-account-btn' opens dialog with title 'Assign Account to Distributor'

account_search_functionality.details: Search input (data-testid='account-search-input') works with debounce. Typing 'test' returns 1 result. Results show with data-testid='account-result-{id}'

select_account_from_search.details: Clicking search result selects account, shows selected state with X button to clear

select_servicing_city_dropdown.details: Dropdown (data-testid='servicing-city-select') shows 6 cities from distributor's operating coverage

select_distributor_location.details: Dropdown (data-testid='location-select') shows 'No specific location' and 'Test (Margao)' options

toggle_primary_backup_checkboxes.details: Primary/Backup checkboxes work mutually exclusive - checking one unchecks the other

enable_special_margin_override.details: Checking 'Special Margin Override' reveals Override Type dropdown and Override Value input fields

create_assignment_successfully.details: Assignment created successfully. Tab count updates to (1). Assignment appears in table with correct columns.

new_assignment_appears_in_table.details: Table (data-testid='assignments-table') shows assignment with Account, Servicing City, Location, Type, Override, Status, Actions columns

delete_assignment_using_trash_icon.details: Trash icon (data-testid='delete-assignment-{id}') opens confirmation dialog. Confirming deletes assignment and shows 'Assignment removed' toast.
